fn-help-content() {
  declare desc="return help content"
  cat <<help_content
    events [-t], Show the last events (-t follows)
    events:list, List logged events
    events:on, Enable events logger
    events:off, Disable events logger
help_content
}

fn-help-content() {
  declare desc="return help content"
  cat <<help_content
    builder-dockerfile:report [<app>] [<flag>], Displays a builder-dockerfile report for one or more apps
    builder-dockerfile:set <app> <property> (<value>), Set or clear a builder-dockerfile property for an app
help_content
}

fn-help-content() {
  declare desc="return help content"
  cat <<help_content
    builder-herokuish:report [<app>] [<flag>], Displays a builder-herokuish report for one or more apps
    builder-herokuish:set <app> <property> (<value>), Set or clear a builder-herokuish property for an app
help_content
}

fn-help-content() {

    builder-nixpacks:report [<app>] [<flag>], Displays a builder-nixpacks report for one or more apps
    builder-nixpacks:set <app> <property> (<value>), Set or clear a builder-nixpacks property for an app

fn-help-content() {
  declare desc="return help content"
  cat <<help_content
    builder-railpack:report [<app>] [<flag>], Displays a builder-railpack report for one or more apps
    builder-railpack:set <app> <property> (<value>), Set or clear a builder-railpack property for an app

}

function remove_dev_dependencies() {
  package_json=$(cat package.json)

  # Remove the "devDependencies" item from package.json
  new_package_json=$(echo "$package_json" | jq 'del(.devDependencies)')

  # Overwrite the package.json file with the updated content
  echo "$new_package_json" > package.json

}

function remove_dev_dependencies() {
	package_json=$(cat package.json)

	# Remove the "devDependencies" item from package.json
	new_package_json=$(echo "$package_json" | jq 'del(.devDependencies)')

	# Overwrite the package.json file with the updated content
	echo "$new_package_json" >package.json

}
